title: thevetia thevetia
intro: Thevetia thevetia, also known as the yellow oleander or poisonous oleander, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical regions of the Americas and the Caribbean. Its medicinal properties are derived from the presence of thevetin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of thevetia thevetia include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of thevetia thevetia include teas, infusions, and ointments, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity and side effects.
